## How tested

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck --prefix apps/web` passes
- [ ] `npm run test --prefix apps/web` passes
- [ ] `make api-test` passes (if the API changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] ADR added/updated for architectural changes
- [ ] No PII or secrets committed
